Exact translation of tamil words
Yennada Yennada  Yennada Yennada
Yennada Yennada Yennada Yennada

Yennada Yennada unnaala
thollaya pochu
sollave illaye thaanaala
ennavo aachu
paaraamal polambavidum
paarthaaley padhukingividum
vaal paiyyan neethaanada

Yennada Yennada unnaalae
thollayaa pochu
sollave illaye thaanaala
ennavo aachu

Naan aalaana vaayaadi
pesaama ponen
pottu sedi naan
mottu vedichen
olungana maadhiri naanu
velangaama pogureney
vidinjaalum uranguara aalu
urangaamey yengureney

Unnoda pesidave ulloora
aasa koodi pochu
kannaadi paathirama ennoda
dhegam maariye pochu ..Yennada Yennada

Nee lesaagi paarthaalum
loosaagi ponen
pacha neruppa pathikiduven

Velayaatu bombayaa kooda
odanjeney naanum kooda
aniyaayam pannura kadhal
adangaama aattam poda

Unnoda nenapu eppodhum
potti pottu kolla
pogaadha kovilukkum naan poyi
posa pannuren enna solla

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Yennada Yennada'?

The song expresses a playful and carefree attitude, celebrating the joys of life and relationships.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

In Varuthapadatha Vaalibar Sangam, the song reflects the light-hearted moments among friends, showcasing their camaraderie and fun.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Shreya Ghoshal and Sooraj Santhosh.

Who composed the music for 'Yennada Yennada'?

The music for this lively track was composed by D Imman.

When was 'Yennada Yennada' released?

The song was released on July 22, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Yennada Yennada, the vibrant energy of the song encapsulates the carefree spirit of youth and friendship. Featured in Varuthapadatha Vaalibar Sangam, it showcases the joyous moments shared among friends, filled with laughter and celebration. The catchy tune and playful lyrics evoke feelings of happiness and excitement, making it a perfect anthem for parties and celebrations. This duet by Shreya Ghoshal and Sooraj Santhosh is sure to uplift anyone's mood.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Yennada Yennada from the movie Varuthapadatha Vaalibar Sangam is a vibrant celebration of youthful energy and joy. With the enchanting voices of Shreya Ghoshal and Sooraj Santhosh, this track perfectly captures the essence of fun and festivity. D Imman's catchy composition combined with Yugabharathi's playful lyrics makes this song an instant favorite for any celebration.
stanzaMeanings: What happened? Because of you, I have lost my way. You didn’t say anything, but I feel like something has happened. If I look around, I see a boy who is lost.
What happened? Because of you, I have lost my way. You didn’t say anything, but I feel like something has happened.
I didn’t speak with my mouth, but I got caught. I was quiet like a good person, but even if I fall, I’m still the one who is awake.
Your words have filled the air with desire. My body has changed after looking in the mirror. What happened? What happened?
Even if you look at me, I will become a fire and burn.
Even if I run away from the game, I will also create trouble. Love is a game that doesn’t stop.
Your thoughts are always stuck in my mind. I won’t let them go. I will go to the temple and offer them. What should I say?
